prompt:
Square 1:1 composition, TRANSPARENT background (full alpha outside shapes — no backdrop color, no gradient panel).

STYLE (match technical blog / product diagram illustration): flat minimal shapes with heavily rounded corners and ends; friendly modern SaaS aesthetic. Outlines are medium-to-bold rounded strokes in dark warm beige / taupe (#4a3d32 through #6b5845) — soft organic stroke feel, not hairline technical pen. Interior fills where used: soft muted beige, sand, or pale warm gray-beige (#d4c4b0 through #e8ddd0) at moderate opacity or flat pastel-beige; keep palette strictly warm neutrals (beige family only — no mint, no blue, no teal, no saturated greens).

Texture: subtle fine paper grain or film grain across filled areas so colors feel tactile, not clinical flat RGB.

Geometry: simple rounded rectangles, circles, pills, arcs; dashed beige connector lines allowed when showing relationships (straight or gentle curves). Symmetrical or centered layout with generous breathing room at edges.

ABSOLUTELY FORBIDDEN: photorealism, scratchboard cross-hatching, engraved etching, 3D isometric boxes, flowchart nodes with arrows and labels, text, letters, numbers, logos, watermarks, robots unless the brief explicitly asks for agent glyphs.

NOT the black-and-white blog hero style — this is soft flat color + rounded diagram illustration.

Subject (flat iconic, centered in square): A balance scale built from rounded pill shapes and soft rectangles: two pans perfectly level, identical rounded weights on each side; optional small rounded hub below; dashed curved connectors OK; symmetrical.
